title: Wider Determinants of Health: August 2025 update
body: " The Wider Determinants of Health tool is designed to:   draw attention to the broad range of individual, social and environmental factors which influence our health provide the public health system with intelligence on the wider determinants of health, to help improve population health and reduce health inequalities   For the August 2025 update, 2 new indicators have been added to the profile showing:   the number of gambling premises per 100,000 population the percentage of people aged 16 to 64 economically inactive due to long- term sickness   Details of this release can be found in ‘Wider Determinants of Health: statistical commentary, August 2025’.  This update also includes new time points for 9 indicators, including indicators on:   children in low-income families - absolute poverty children in low-income families - relative poverty fuel poverty gender pay gap average weekly earnings work-related illness affordability of home ownership home repossessions - landlord home repossessions - mortgage   If you would like to send us feedback on the tool contact pha-ohid@dhsc.gov.uk. "
